header.title: How we work with you
header.subtitle: Straightforward engagement models. We settle on final pricing and timelines after technical discovery and agreed scope, not before.

disclaimer: Every quote is tailored once we understand your product, users, and constraints. No surprise invoices mid-flight.

plans.title: Discovery & roadmap
plans.lead: Most projects fail before a line of code gets written. We spend real time here so yours doesn't.
plans.footnote: Usually a fixed discovery fee, credited toward the build if you move forward.

plans.title: Build & launch
plans.lead: We'd rather show you something real every two weeks than promise you everything at the end.
bullets: Handover so your team can run the system without us
plans.footnote: Project-based or phased contracts. Any scope changes get agreed in writing, not assumed.

plans.title: Iterate & support
plans.lead: Launch is the start of the real work, not the finish line. We stay close enough to catch what breaks.
bullets: Roadmap iterations, new modules, and refinements
plans.footnote: Retainers come with a clear definition of capacity and response times, so there's no guessing.
